gist.headline: Anchors aweigh for live edits
gist.blurb: Pyanchor just dropped anchor in the Greenhouse! It's a nifty AI live-edit sidecar for your web apps—just add one line of code and start pointing at things to change them.
gist.summary: Added Pyanchor, an open-source AI live-edit sidecar for web apps, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover and integrate Pyanchor to easily live-edit Next.js, Vite, and Astro apps directly from the browser.
gist.visual_concept: Pyanchor suggests a nautical theme (anchor). Polly the bee wearing a tiny sailor hat, dropping a glowing lime green anchor into a digital garden of code-plants, representing the new app taking root in the Greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sailor hat, dropping a glowing lime green (#ecf874) anchor into a digital garden where code-plants sprout from flower pots. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a web page being edited. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
